name: Thumbnail Agent
description: Internal thumbnail generator with brand-specific thumbnail agents, fixed templates, fixed fonts, script-based image generation, optional person reference images, and PNG download.
security_notes: Do not share your personal OpenAI API key.
Each copied app should use its own OpenAI API key or a separate company-managed key.
Anyone with access to the hosted link can use the app unless they add their own access control.
usage_notes: Optionally upload a person reference image when the script needs a specific person.
